title: SettlementMethodTypeValues
description: Specifies the type of method used to settle the payment instruction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: InstructedAgent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Settlement is done by the agent instructed to execute a payment instruction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: InstructingAgent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Settlement is done by the agent instructing and forwarding the payment to the next party in the payment chain.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CoverMethod
x-enumeration-literals.description: Settlement is done through a cover payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ClearingSystem
x-enumeration-literals.description: Settlement is done through a payment clearing system.
